message:
fcp-raptorq/chunk: reject chunk_size=0 manifests before modulo panic

`ChunkedObjectManifest::chunk_size_at` computed `total_len % chunk_size`
when `index == chunks.len() - 1`. `from_payload` asserts `chunk_size > 0`,
but the struct is `Deserialize`, so a peer can ship a manifest with
`chunk_size: 0` and any `total_len`. Calling `chunk_size_at(last_index)`
on that manifest panics with attempt-to-divide-by-zero.

Add a `ChunkError::InvalidChunkSize` variant and check for
`chunk_size == 0` before the modulo. Regression test exercises a
forged manifest with `chunk_size: 0` on both the last and a non-last
index, and confirms out-of-bounds index still wins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
